Slot: WRIST
AC: 15
STR: +7 DEX: +7 HP: +40
WT: 3.0 Size: TINY
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD MNK BRD ROG BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Slot: WRIST
AC: 15
STR: +7 DEX: +7 HP: +40
WT: 3.0 Size: TINY
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD MNK BRD ROG BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Velious Chain 1
Tint:

Lucy Entry By:Kheldar

Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-09 02:31:26
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Average Price: 3,750pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 45

Nice bracer

Soloed it once and duoed it another. Have two of these bracers. I must say the help quite a bit. The mob wasnt so hard, and the hp bonus helps a bundle! Good for just about every melee class. 59 ranger of Tunare----Drinal

Umbral Plains
QuoteReply
# Jun 06 2002 at 1:41 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361839423
10 posts
The bracers in UP are 15ac 15 One stat and 6 on saves.

They are going for 15k. So I think this will be in the 4-6k range.
▲ Page top
RE: Umbral Plains
QuoteReply
# Aug 10 2002 at 8:51 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592248734557
73 posts
Look again, the UP bracers have only 12ac but are very nice and go for 8-16k on MT server.
▲ Page top
RE: Umbral Plains
QuoteReply
# Feb 24 2003 at 12:07 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592255930943
720 posts
heh, there is a difference between velks an UP... here it is, you have to run through ME to get to UP, now to some this is no biggie, but this is where alot are wrong, at 48 i can run to velks an get a group, at 48 i can not run through ME, Xi thall centiens don't play, specially when they nuke for 500dmg an quad pretty hard. An when u are running to UP they are all over near there. To top it off there are tons of mobs that see thru invis. so most of the time you need a bard to run you into UP, even yet then, killing the mob that drops the bracer is no slouch. Don't get me wrong i am not saying he is harder, but for a person below 52 it is very hard to get into UP an get what your looking for, while velks at 48 i can get what i need.....just my 200pp
▲ Page top

# Jun 01 2002 at 1:49 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591757865610
107 posts

Edited, Tue Mar 18 17:55:15 2003
▲ Page top
RE: wrist bands
QuoteReply
# Apr 16 2002 at 6:47 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591766647124
45 posts
Velks isnt really deep. it goes up pretty far, Frenzy Broodling spawns under TS (top shelf) so thats all the way up. your not gonna solo anything here untill your about about 60. TS is camped 24/7 so you gotta wait for a opening in the group and hope they ask you. TS groups are usually 55+ sometimes lower though.

Playyer
55 Troubadour
Bristlebane
▲ Page top
RE: wrist bands
QuoteReply
# Apr 30 2003 at 2:43 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591782845977
129 posts
Well, TS is like never camped when I go into Velks, and on top of that, I've been in a group at lvl 46 killin the Frenz spider, it dropped Awakening Portal and The Handwraps. Server shut down so the Iksar that got it lost the Handwraps, but it was fun while we played. I had 53 Monk, me 46 Sk, 61 Druid, my friend a 45 monk Iksar. Took down the dude fast and had lotsa fun. Hiope to find the people I killed the Spider with and do it again =D
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Apr 10 2002 at 6:49 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) was in TS group for a few hours, Frenzy Broodling popped 3 times... first time Wraps, was gravied to a tank. second time dropped Wristbands (i won them), third time dropped bracer again! (woot! i won those too!) just to **** off the guy that was aruguing and left my group cause he didnt win these (and had already won the wraps and rolled on the first bracer) i think ill give them to my 22 SK twink!
#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 11 2002 at 2:00 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) The price on that is a joke, right? It doesn't even have a proc or haste. 7 STR and 7 DEX isn't worth that much.

4 posts

RE: Joke prices
QuoteReply
# Mar 14 2002 at 12:34 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592253107756
13 posts
The 15ac and 40hps per bracer means more. Compare this bracer to others out there. 30ac 14str 14agi and 80hps out of the bracer slots is not bad. These are quite comparable to Velious quest armor which costs alot to buy the MQ rights to.

It seems I saw these on a warrior in EC once. The graphic I saw was same as handwraps ... silverish bandage wrap look to em. I assumed they were these, since I had never seen that graphic before. Hope that made sense :)

What do these look like?
QuoteReply
# Nov 22 2001 at 11:11 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595780881775
1,154 posts
What is the graphic for these? Anybody know?
▲ Page top
RE: What do these look like?
QuoteReply
# Aug 28 2002 at 11:46 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591764595777
92 posts
Yeah - I just was given these by a friend today - and when I put it on (with ShowVeliousGraphicsWithLuclin=TRUE setting in the eqclient.ini file...) the one wrist looked like it had some sort of gold wrapping/chain look... but definetly very cool.

I just installed a new graphics card tonight at my home office - so I will get a look at them on this card later tonight. My friend who gave it to me could not corraberate what I saw... he said he saw normal luclin human model chain graphic...

Work graphics card is a GeForce2 32mb DDR... while the one I installed tonight at home is a GeForce4 Ti4200 64mb DDR one... if that matters. I know different cards and different settings in the .ini file alter these things.

Ashremm Goldendawn
51st Level Monk
Luclin Server
<Misfits of Carnage>
▲ Page top
RE: What do these look like?
QuoteReply
# Dec 02 2001 at 3:05 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593965791865
View User Forum
47 posts
The graphic on a barb is no graphic, so it gives the appearance of the ornate leather on a naked barb. I like the look but I need two of em to get it. I won these on a roll off in a group at the safe hall, I subsequently traded this for a Frostbringer. I miss my silver chitin wristband though and am in search of gettin another one now.
▲ Page top
RE: What do these look like?
QuoteReply
# Mar 07 2002 at 2:33 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593965791865
View User Forum
47 posts
Finally picked another Silver chitin Wristband up in the Bazaar in Luclin. I traded a barbed BP for one. These things can be worn as a pair! Think of this now ac 15 +7 strength and dex +40 hps x 2. I can't think of Bp's cept for planes or Umbral unless they off bosses that give better ac than 2 of these together. These are great wrist items!!!! More dex to proc weapons doesn't hurt either, and the strength goes right to helpin your attack rating. These are a must for any serious warrior. The resist gear can be made up in other areas. Get yourself at least one if you're a warrior.
▲ Page top
RE: What do these look like?
QuoteReply
# Mar 18 2002 at 12:37 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591757004200
53 posts
Bracers of Benevolence are
+17 AC +8 Str +8 Sta +12 vsMg +5 vsFire +12 vsCold +30 HP +0.10 Wt
They aren't lore either. Just need good CoV faction and a somewhat beefy guild, as well as the ability to get several groups up to WW any time of the day.

#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 18 2001 at 1:21 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Well at least with a weight of 3.0 we aint gonna hear MONK. Definitely decent for most tanks but rogues in particular could use this. Very nice item.
RE: No Monk!
QuoteReply
# Aug 20 2001 at 2:22 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591758247306
7 posts
With the added weight allowance monks get at higher levels it is easy for us to put on a few items that weight more.
I wear iksar-hide boots that weight 2.5, and I am still at 11 weight. Considering that I still wear Vox bracers, I'd put a pair of these on and not even sweat at the weight, having room to spare before hitting my limit of 18.
